features.heading: Five tools. One hiring OS.
features.subheading: Everything your hiring team needs in one place — from writing the JD to making the offer.

briefGenerator.title: AI Brief Generator
briefGenerator.desc: Instantly generate a structured candidate brief — match score, key strengths, red flags, and top interview questions — from any CV.

jdWriter.title: JD Writer
jdWriter.desc: Write bias-free, compelling job descriptions in seconds. AI tailors the tone and requirements to attract the right candidates.

pipeline.title: Pipeline Board
pipeline.desc: Drag-and-drop kanban for your hiring pipeline. Track every candidate from applied to offer with full status history.

bulkScreening.title: Bulk Screening
bulkScreening.desc: Upload multiple CVs at once. AI scores and ranks every applicant against your role criteria — no manual reading required.

talentPool.title: Talent Pool
talentPool.desc: Never lose a great candidate. Build a searchable pool of past applicants you can re-engage for future roles instantly.
